creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
On one of my systems I disabled NLS support via WITHOUT_NLS, so libc doesn't get NLS support compiled in and the language output is always the C locale.

The testcase should either not be installed when MK_NLS == no, or should be split up and the part that requires LC_ALL=nl_NL.ISO8859-1 should be skipped/not installed.
